paper_title: Kinematic Model and Late Quaternary Slip Along the Huoyanshan Reverse Fault-and-fold Belt

methods.description: This method reconstructs the kinematic relationship between deformed river terraces and subsurface fault geometry using a combined fault folding model. It is used to understand the deformation rate of the Huoyanshan structure.

steps.description: Summarize several kinematic models to reflect different thrust fault-related folding processes.
steps.searchable_summary: summarize kinematic models for thrust fault-related folding

steps.description: Use the combined fault folding model to reconstruct the kinematic relationship between the deformed river terraces and the subsurface fault geometry.
steps.searchable_summary: apply combined fault folding model to reconstruct kinematic relationship

methods.description: This method estimates the total shortening from the trigonometric relationship between the vertical uplift of the terrace and the dip angle of the bedrock at the surface. It is used to calculate the shortening values and rates for different terraces.

steps.description: Estimate total shortening from the trigonometric relationship between the vertical uplift of the terrace and the dip angle of the bedrock at the surface.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate total shortening using trigonometric relationship

steps.description: Calculate shortening values for different terraces using the dip angle of the fault plane as 50.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate shortening values for terraces using fault plane dip angle
outputs: shortening values for T1, T2, T4

steps.description: Estimate the shortening rate of T4 after it was abandoned.
